title: Simplified Data Warehouse Architecture Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the flow of data from source systems through the staging, storage, and presentation layers of a data warehouse architecture.
relationships: Source Systems feed raw data into the ETL Process
ETL Process cleanses and transforms data, then loads it into the Staging Area
Staging Area is a temporary storage for ETL processing
Processed data is moved from the Staging Area to the Data Warehouse Storage
Data Warehouse Storage feeds subject-specific Data Marts
Data Marts and Data Warehouse serve data to BI & Analytics Tools for end-users
